title: polygala molluginifolia
intro: Polygala molluginifolia, also known as Chinese polygala or yuan zhi, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, native to China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala molluginifolia include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala molluginifolia is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of teas, capsules, or extracts to promote overall well-being and longevity.
